drill_or_video_name: Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics — Pec Sequence
description: Pre-set on the glove side with the ball resting on the throwing-side pec; from that loaded position fire hip-then-shoulder-then-arm in sequence so the trunk stays closed while the lower half initiates. Isolates the separation feel without a full delivery.
source: Trevor Bauer YouTube (Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics)
notes: Cue: hip leads, trunk waits. relevance: trains hip-shoulder separation feel and keeps the trunk closed while the hips rotate — directly attacks shoulders-fly-open

drill_or_video_name: Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics — Static 45 Skier
description: Split stance with back foot at 45 degrees and heel off the ground; load the glove side then rotate/fire the back hip and throw. Trains the back hip to drive and clear rather than leak.
source: Trevor Bauer YouTube (Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics)
notes: Cue: fire and clear the back hip. relevance: fixes back-hip leak / drop-no-rotate transition by isolating trail-hip drive

drill_or_video_name: Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics — Posture Squat
description: Feet ~shoulder width
sets_x_reps: squat as low as possible to load both hips
source: then kick the lead leg and rotate — combines the Pec Sequence and Static 45 Skier into one seamless drop-to-rotate transition.
timestamp: Trevor Bauer YouTube (Top 3 Drills for PERFECT Mechanics)
column15: Bauer's most important of the three — chains the other two. relevance: directly trains the good-drop-then-rotate sequence Landon is missing
